title: Audit Retention Policies Response
description: Response shape for GET /api/v1/audit/retention-policies. Mirrors TraigentBackend audit_routes.get_retention_policies, which returns both a canonical `data` list and a `policies` alias so dashboard clients reading either field stay in sync.

data.description: Canonical retention policy list. Mirrors `policies` for legacy clients reading `data`.

policies.description: Same policies as `data`, kept for dashboard clients reading `policies`.

policy_id.description: Stable identifier for the retention policy.

retention_days.description: Number of days a covered record is retained before deletion.

grace_period_days.description: Days beyond `retention_days` during which records may still be recovered.

applies_to.description: Record classes covered by the policy (e.g. `audit_logs`, `security_events`).

enforced.description: Whether the policy is currently being enforced by the backend.
